identity.name: metadata_first_prose_struct_schema_model
identity.title: Amend kernel with metadata-first prose->struct->schema model

objective: Adopt the validated metadata-first schema stack for rooted source resolution, structural extraction, canonical semantic assembly, document projection, and projection binding as a kernel review packet.
constraints: The validated bundle payload must remain byte-identical during packet generation.
The canonical semantic model remains the authoritative middle of the metadata stack.
Workflow docs remain explanatory and must not back-author model semantics.
The scm.pattern packet lane remains a downstream operational carrier and must not define semantic authority.
Document projection remains downstream of the semantic middle.
No docgen-only metadata lane may be introduced.
All packet refs must remain repo-relative.
assumptions: The validated bundle is the ingress basis for the amendment packet.
Local runtime validates the packet structurally before any human decision.
Human review remains authoritative before any kernel adoption beyond the packet lane.
acceptance_criteria: The validated metadata schema and example stack is included unchanged in the transport bundle.
The packet emits the canonical machine and human artifact family.
Packet input and deliverable roles are traceable to the approved ChatGPT packet family registry.
The metadata metaschema lane is declared in kernel source and policy surfaces before amendment closeout.
The metadata metaschema lane admits and materializes both the metadata family registry and the lane dependency registry.
The lane dependency order is explicit: metaschema_model is upstream, workflow_docs are explanatory only, and scm_pattern_workflow remains downstream.
The packet validates against the live packet schemas and trust boundary.
The packet remains review-only until an authoritative human decision exists.
review_criteria: Workflow docs remain derived from the metaschema model.
The scm.pattern workflow remains constrained by the metaschema model rather than defining it.
Anchor binding and compatibility policy remain explicit.
The bundle payload remains unchanged from the validated source bundle.

stale_when: landed metadata metaschema lane basis change
